div.span:
Laboratory Campus / LabTalk
ACTIVE ALPHA
portal, registries, datasets, cases, labs,
proof overlays, collaboration and planning

Curriculum and lesson paths
DRAFT / EVOLVING
database literacy, SelfDoc systems, history,
mutation safety, scripting, indexes and relations

Delivery and extension lanes
RESERVED / EXPERIMENTAL
local portal, provider-neutral LMS queue,
GUI and external-tool experiments

HELP, metadata, contracts, CMDHELPCHK
ACTIVE / PARTIAL
explanation, identity, organization, drift checks

Evidence and proof artifacts
ACTIVE
source contracts, runtime canaries, transcripts,
HELP readback, tests, screenshots, hashes

SelfDoc
ACTIVE, REPORT-ONLY BY DEFAULT
collects, classifies, crosswalks,
and preserves provenance

MDO and manualgen
GOVERNED / EVOLVING
review packets, decisions, validation,
draft assembly, promotion records

Reviewed derivatives
VERSIONED OUTPUTS
manuals, diagrams, catalogs, x64base.com,
and DotTalk++ artifact-room material

x64base engine services
ACTIVE
DbArea/workspaces, classic/VFP/x64 DBF,
memos, indexes, relations, buffering, locking

DotTalk++ command and runtime identity
ACTIVE
command shell, expression/function surface,
HELP routing, validation, automation host

DotScript
ACTIVE / EVOLVING
repeatable .dts command files, variables,
IF and loop/scan control structures

Open API lanes
IN DEVELOPMENT
index lifecycle and GUI-neutral services

Student and custom index extension lane
ACTIVE STUBS + PLANNED ATTACHMENT CONTRACT
SIX single-tag and SCX compound labs;
SNX reserved/container groundwork; REINDEX CUSTOM opt-in

Boundary rule
Laboratory Campus may launch, sequence, explain, and teach.
It does not redefine x64base or DotTalk++ runtime behavior.
